designSystemSummary: PureVPN runs on ONE token system expressed in TWO themes. Font is Plus Jakarta Sans (400/500/600/700/800) throughout. Brand color is purple: #7C2FF7 (primary/links/active) with a #5B3DF5→#7358FF CTA gradient; semantics are green(#00BA00/#7DE3B0 low), yellow(#FFE300 medium), orange(#FFB454/#FF5C47 high), red(#FF0000/#FF5C5C critical/danger), blue(#5CC8FF/#70CFFE info). THEME A — Light app + marketing: white cards (#FFFFFF) on cool off-white canvas (#F9FAFB / alt #F6F6F6), near-black headings (#191D25/#222222), muted slate body (#637381), lavender active states (#ECE8FF), ~16px card radii, whisper-soft shadows, hairline borders (#EEECEC). THEME B — Dark hero + report: near-black indigo grounds (#0E0A2C hero, #0B0E14 report) with a signature purple radial glow bleeding from a top/upper-right corner, cool dark panels (#191D25/#313745), white text with muted-lavender tiers (#CFC1D8 > #A989C8 > #897398), and inline accent recoloring of headline words (red #FF0000, emerald #7DE3B0). Signature motifs across both themes: pill-shaped email/domain capture bars (input + inline CTA), uppercase letter-spaced eyebrow labels, big-number KPI stat cards with colored accents, ranked horizontal/vertical bar charts, severity dot-badges, and a monospace terminal-card treatment unique to the hero-passwords screen. The report/hero also uses full-round translucent-tinted status pills over dark. Marketing wraps content in a max-width ~1200px centered column; dashboards use a fixed ~180–272px white sidebar + fluid light canvas.

componentInventory.name: MarketingLayout
componentInventory.description: Centered max-width (~1200px) single-column scroll shell with alternating #FFFFFF / #F6F6F6 section bands, ~120px side gutters desktop / 24px mobile, and large vertical section padding (80–120px).

componentInventory.name: DarkHeroFrame / RoundedPageContainer
componentInventory.description: Full-bleed dark navy (#0E0A2C) rounded container (~24px radius) with 1px translucent white hairline border and a layered purple radial-gradient glow (top/upper-right). Base for hero variants and the report page background.

componentInventory.name: DashboardLayout
componentInventory.description: Two-zone app shell: fixed white sidebar (180–272px) + scrolling light canvas (#F9FAFB) with top bar, optional tab strip, and content column. Sidebar collapses to icon-rail/off-canvas drawer on smaller widths.

componentInventory.name: Sidebar / SidebarNavItem
componentInventory.description: Vertical nav: logo lockup, optional team switcher + collapse toggle, grouped nav rows (icon+label) with dividers, optional bottom promo card. Active item = lavender (#ECE8FF) pill + purple text/icon, some with a 2–3px purple left accent bar bleeding off-edge.
componentInventory.variants: item: default / muted-disabled / active-pill / active-with-left-bar; sidebar: with-team-block, with-upgrade-card

componentInventory.name: TopBar
componentInventory.description: App content header: page title (H1) left; right cluster of Live Support/help icon, notification bell (optional red unread dot), circular avatar (initials on lavender or image).

componentInventory.name: NavBar (marketing)
componentInventory.description: Full-width white top nav: logo left, center links with dropdown carets, right Login text link + Get started pill button. Sticky on scroll; hamburger drawer on mobile.

componentInventory.name: Button
componentInventory.description: Primary rounded CTA plus secondary/text variants. Purple solid (#7C2FF7) or CTA gradient (#5B3DF5→#7358FF) for marketing/app; emerald (#2ECB8C/#7DE3B0) dark-ink variant for the passwords hero; white outlined secondary with optional brand icon.
componentInventory.variants: primary-purple, primary-gradient, primary-green(dark-ink), secondary-outline, text-link, pill(fully-round) / rounded(8–12px); sizes sm/md/lg; states default/hover/active/disabled/loading; with-icon

componentInventory.name: Input / TextInput
componentInventory.description: Text/email field. Borderless variant living inside a capture bar; standalone bordered variant (1px #DFDCDC, ~8px radius) for dashboard forms; large-radius search variant with leading magnifier.
componentInventory.variants: borderless-in-bar, bordered-standalone, readonly, search-with-icon; states placeholder/focus/filled/invalid

componentInventory.name: CaptureBar (Email/DomainInputGroup)
componentInventory.description: Signature rounded pill/panel wrapping a borderless input + inline primary Button. Translucent dark fill on dark surfaces (#35324D/#313745), light on light. Nested-border pattern: faint outer shell + inset inner button.
componentInventory.variants: hero-large-dark, footer-compact-dark, green-cta / purple-cta; inline(desktop) / stacked(mobile); states default/focus/error/loading

componentInventory.name: EyebrowLabel / Overline
componentInventory.description: Uppercase letter-spaced (~+0.08em) micro-label above headings or section eyebrows/column headers.
componentInventory.variants: purple(#7C2FF7), red(#FF5C5C danger/CONFIDENTIAL), muted-lavender(on dark), gray(section overline)

componentInventory.name: DisplayHeadline
componentInventory.description: ExtraBold multi-line hero/section headline supporting inline recolored emphasis spans (red #FF0000, emerald #7DE3B0, colored punctuation).

componentInventory.name: SectionHeader
componentInventory.description: H2 (optionally with eyebrow above) + muted one-line description, centered (marketing) or left-aligned (dashboard/report).

componentInventory.name: StatBlock / StatCard
componentInventory.description: Big-number KPI. Marketing StatBlock = number + caption with optional vertical divider (4-up rows). Dashboard StatCard = white rounded card, label (+info icon), large number. Report StatCard = dark card with colored top accent + colored number. Alert variant colors the number red.
componentInventory.variants: marketing-divider-row, dashboard-white-card, report-dark-accent-top; number tone neutral/red-alert/red/orange/blue/white; with/without info-icon

componentInventory.name: Badge / Pill
componentInventory.description: Rounded status/label pill. Severity dot-badges (Low green / Medium yellow / High orange / Critical red on low-alpha tint), status badges (lavender 'Open' + chevron dropdown), confidential/COMPROMISED danger pills (tinted red + border, optional leading dot), neutral source-type chips, count filter pills.
componentInventory.variants: severity(low/med/high/critical), status-dropdown, danger-outline(with-dot), confidential-pink, neutral-chip, filter-count(active-lavender/default), discount-chip

componentInventory.name: Tabs
componentInventory.description: Horizontal icon+label tab strip with a purple (#5B3DF5) active underline over a full-width bottom hairline; horizontally scrollable on mobile.

componentInventory.name: DataTable / DataTableCard
componentInventory.description: Sortable/structured table. Dashboard variant: light header band (#F6F6F6), uppercase column labels, select-all + row checkboxes, two-line identity cell, chip/badge/date cells, sort toggles, hairline row separators. Report variant: dark card-wrapped, rounded pill-style data rows, masked values, blue link cells, em-dash placeholders. Collapses to stacked label:value cards on mobile.
componentInventory.variants: light-dashboard(sortable, selectable), dark-report(pill-rows, masked/link cells); cell types text/two-line/chip/badge/link/masked/date; mobile-stacked

componentInventory.name: ChartCard
componentInventory.description: White(light) or dark(report) rounded panel: title + info icon + optional legend row + chart body. Wrapper for all data viz.
componentInventory.variants: full-width, half-width, asymmetric, light / dark, with-legend / without

componentInventory.name: HBarChart
componentInventory.description: Ranked horizontal bar chart on dark track: left category label, bar (red→orange gradient OR solid blue), right-aligned value. No axes.

componentInventory.name: VBarChart
componentInventory.description: Vertical bar chart, weekday categories, y-axis ticks, rounded-top bars with vertical gradient (red→orange) or solid purple fills.

componentInventory.name: LineChart / Sparkline
componentInventory.description: Single- or multi-series line chart. Report exposure-timeline sparkline (red line + faint red area fill, no axes); threat-overview multi-line (4 severity series with light gridlines).

componentInventory.name: StackedAreaChart
componentInventory.description: Smooth overlapping semi-transparent area bands, each with a 180deg fade-to-transparent gradient (green→amber→coral/red).

componentInventory.name: StackedBarChart
componentInventory.description: Single wide horizontal bar split into flat saturated color segments (red/orange/yellow) with axis labels.

componentInventory.name: LegendRow
componentInventory.description: Inline colored-dot + label items describing chart series/severity.

componentInventory.name: ComparisonCard
componentInventory.description: Rounded card with eyebrow + title + green-check bullet list; lavender vs gray tinted pair.

componentInventory.name: CheckBullet / ChecklistItem
componentInventory.description: Filled circular check + text line. Green (#00BA00) comparison bullets; purple disc + white tick referral checklist; subtle dark circle in how-it-works steps.

componentInventory.name: FeatureCard
componentInventory.description: Light-gray rounded panel with centered white icon-tile (thin lavender border, purple stroke icon) + title + body.

componentInventory.name: MediaCard / GlowingImagePlaceholder
componentInventory.description: Card/placeholder with media region + optional title/body. Marketing MediaCard (black image top + text); hero glowing placeholder (grey fill + colored outer glow ring).

componentInventory.name: FlowBar (Infostealer pipeline)
componentInventory.description: Dark rounded purple-gradient bar containing translucent chips joined by arrow connectors; informational pipeline graphic.

componentInventory.name: SplitPanel
componentInventory.description: Two-tone flush panel: solid-purple illustration half + dark step-list half with numbered check steps.

componentInventory.name: FaqAccordion / FaqItem
componentInventory.description: Accordion row: question + circular +/- toggle, hairline divider; expand/collapse with icon rotation.

componentInventory.name: CalloutBanner
componentInventory.description: Tinted full-width banner with left accent border + bold lead-in + muted body. Danger red variant (report) shown.

componentInventory.name: MetaBar
componentInventory.description: Full-width dark rounded strip holding inline label:value pairs; wraps to vertical stack on mobile.

componentInventory.name: GradientBanner
componentInventory.description: Full-bleed promo strip with purple→white horizontal gradient and inline CTA link.

componentInventory.name: TerminalCard
componentInventory.description: macOS-window dark card: title bar with 3 traffic-light dots + mono title, hairline divider, body slot (domain row, stat tiles, chart, credential row). Entire card set in monospace.

componentInventory.name: TrafficLightDots
componentInventory.description: Row of 3 window-control dots (red/amber/green) — pure CSS.

componentInventory.name: CredentialRow
componentInventory.description: Mono result row: masked email (cyan) + chevron + target system + tag pill.

componentInventory.name: ReassuranceLine
componentInventory.description: Leading shield-check icon + muted multiline text.

componentInventory.name: BulletTrustRow
componentInventory.description: Inline middot-separated micro-benefits line.

componentInventory.name: PartnerLogoStrip
componentInventory.description: Evenly distributed row of monochrome white/grey partner logos, optional hairline divider above.

componentInventory.name: Footer
componentInventory.description: Dark (#222222) footer: logo + social icon circles, hairline, link columns + email-capture CTA, copyright row.

componentInventory.name: SocialIconCircle
componentInventory.description: Filled gray circle with white social glyph, hover state.

componentInventory.name: IconButton
componentInventory.description: Bare stroke-icon action button (bell, help, collapse toggle, filters).

componentInventory.name: Avatar
componentInventory.description: Circular user avatar — initials on lavender fill or image.

componentInventory.name: Divider / Hairline
componentInventory.description: Thin 1px separator; horizontal (nav/footer/faq/rows) or vertical (between stats); low-opacity white on dark.

componentInventory.name: UpgradePlanCard
componentInventory.description: Gold-gradient sidebar promo card with crown icon, label, and -20% discount pill.

componentInventory.name: Logo
componentInventory.description: PureVPN lockup: purple gradient rounded-square/shield mark + 'purevpn' wordmark (dark) or white footer variant.

componentInventory_note: full shared library deduped across all 7 screens

screenBuildOrder.keyChallenges: Simplest surface and best warm-up: establishes DarkHeroFrame + glow, DisplayHeadline with red span, CaptureBar (purple CTA), ReassuranceLine, BulletTrustRow, PartnerLogoStrip. Main fidelity risk is the yellow outer-glow ring on the media placeholder (large blur box-shadow) and matching low-opacity dividers on the gradient. No data/charts.

Reuses hero shell but adds the mono TerminalCard system: two font families (sans + monospace), TrafficLightDots, StatTiles, a sparkline area LineChart, CredentialRow, tinted status pills, and green (dark-ink) CTA variant. Multi-color headline with tiny colored periods and the three-tier muted-lavender text ramp are easy to miss.

First dashboard: builds DashboardLayout + Sidebar + TopBar + Card + Button + readonly Input + GradientBanner + ChecklistItem + OverlineLabel. Delicate three-white contrast (canvas #F9FAFB vs cards vs sidebar), purple→white banner fade reaching page bg, and the composited referral hero illustration (source SVG available). No charts — good layout-shell foundation before data-heavy screens.

Dark long-scroll document. Introduces dark ChartCard, HBarChart (gradient + solid variants), dark DataTableCard with masked/link/em-dash cells, StatCard with colored top-accent, CalloutBanner, MetaBar, AlertPill. Hardest parts: two ranked bar charts, responsive dark tables (horizontal-scroll vs stacked), and the precise dark-panel color hierarchy (#191D25/#313745/#343B4B/#191218).

Longest marketing page (10 sections). Reuses hero + CaptureBar + PartnerLogoStrip + StatBlock + Footer, but adds many one-off sections: ComparisonCards, FlowBar pipeline, FeatureCards with icon tiles, MediaCards, SplitPanel, FaqAccordion. High volume of layout work and reflow rules (4-up→2x2→1col, 3+2 feature grid, split-panel stacking) more than technical difficulty.

Most interactive screen: Tabs, 4-up StatCards (with red alert number), search Input, single-select FilterPills with counts, and the full sortable/selectable DataTable with two-line identity cells, SourceType chips, SeverityBadges, and a StatusBadge dropdown. Table→stacked-card mobile transform and select-all indeterminate state are the key challenges.

Chart-heaviest screen and the true test of the dataviz layer: multi-line chart, smooth stacked-area/stream chart with per-band fade gradients, vertical bar chart (gradient + purple), horizontal stacked bar, plus asymmetric and 50/50 ChartCard grids, LegendRows, StatBlocks, and severity ListRows. Build last so every chart wrapper and severity token is already proven.

available: logos/purevpn_logo.svg — PureVPN wordmark/logo for nav + all three dashboard sidebars (raster inside SVG, 123x40)
Plus Jakarta Sans full family (ttf, weights 400/500/600/700/800) — self-host, satisfies every typography role and the 'plus-jakarta-sans' asset need
icons/option1_svg.svg (320x336, 61 vector paths) — the referral-hero illustration for dashboard-pro-plan
icons/Rectangle 39.svg (1440x578, gradient) — hero background gradient sweep (home-landing / hero shells)
icons/Frame 6.svg (1106x131) and icons/Group 67.svg (1134x100) — partner-logo row strips for home-landing + hero-breached
icons/Frame 4.svg (1400x872) and icons/Frame 4 (1).svg (1400x833) — composite section mockups usable as MediaCard / how-it-works / hero media placeholders (embedded raster)
icons/Group 80.svg (938x551), Group 61/62 (554x310), Group 121 / Frame 12 (522x273) — misc composite/illustration blocks usable as report or section mockups
missing: purevpn-logo-white — white/footer + dark-sidebar logo variant (only the color wordmark SVG is provided; recolor or export)

Individual partner logos (Samsung, HelloRache, Sitecore, Hiive, Ruby Ribbon, KD_, Bending Spoons) as clean monochrome white SVGs — only pre-composited row strips exist; needed if the strip must be responsive/reflowed
Real report/product screenshots for the 3 MediaCards and the how-it-works purple panel (currently black/grey placeholders)
referral-hero final composited art IF option1_svg.svg proves to be a different illustration than the 3D phone+coins scene (verify)
Brand/social glyphs: LinkedIn 'in' mark (dashboard-pro-plan) and footer socials (Facebook, X, Instagram, YouTube, Reddit, Discord) — source from a brand-icon set
A licensed monospace font (JetBrains Mono / SF Mono) for the hero-passwords TerminalCard — not present in Brandkit
recreatable: All UI line-icons: sidebar nav set, tab icons (shield/layers/people/link/gear), top-bar (bell/help/chat), info-circle, search magnifier, chevrons, sort double-arrow, feature-card icons (bell/search/grid/card), crown, faq +/- — use Lucide/Heroicons and tint per theme

All gradients & glows as pure CSS: hero purple radial glow, report top glow, CTA gradient (#5B3DF5→#7358FF), purple→white banner fade, yellow media glow (box-shadow), card-blue gradient — no image assets needed
Green check circles / purple check discs, traffic-light dots, colored severity dots, confidential/COMPROMISED pills, discount chip — pure CSS/SVG
All charts (HBar/VBar/stacked-area/stacked-bar/multi-line/sparkline) rendered from data via SVG or a charting lib using the documented chartRamps — no static image assets
Flow-bar emoji/icon chips, middot separators, hairline dividers — CSS/emoji/inline SVG
Avatar initials chips — generated from user data on a lavender fill

radii: 10 (stat cards, chart panels, table rows, sidebar active pill)
12 (dashboard cards, table card, CTA on dark)
16 (feature/media cards, flow bar, dashboard stat cards, chart cards)
24 (hero frame / rounded page container / large marketing cards)
999 (fully-round pills, badges, filter pills, social circles, avatars, primary pill buttons)
shadows: none — hairline border only (#EEECEC on light, #FFFFFF ~8-12% on dark)
sm: 0 2px 8px rgba(16,24,40,0.05) — table lift, filter pills
md: 0 8px 24px rgba(16,24,40,0.05) — dashboard stat cards & content cards (soft, low-alpha; do not over-darken)
lg: 0 16px 40px rgba(16,24,40,0.08) — hero media cards, modal/dropdown popovers
glow-purple: 0 0 120px 40px rgba(124,47,247,0.35) — hero/report ambient purple glow (radial-gradient preferred over box-shadow)
glow-yellow: 0 0 60px 8px rgba(255,227,0,0.55) — hero-breached media placeholder ring/halo
glow-cta: 0 8px 24px rgba(91,61,245,0.35) — optional lift on primary purple CTA hover
breakpoints: sm: 640px (mobile → single column; sidebars become off-canvas drawer; capture bars & buttons stack full-width; tables become stacked label:value cards)
md: 768px (tablet; 4-up stat grids → 2x2; charts stack to one column; marketing comparison/feature cards stack)
lg: 1024px (sidebar collapses to icon-rail; tabs/filter pills horizontally scrollable; dashboard content fluid)
xl: 1280px (full desktop layouts; marketing container maxes ~1200px, report column ~1140px)
2xl: 1440px (design reference frame / max content width, centered with gutters)
risks: Two font families: the hero-passwords TerminalCard requires a monospace not in Brandkit — must license/self-host JetBrains Mono or SF Mono, or the card will render in Plus Jakarta and lose fidelity.
Delicate low-contrast whites on light theme (canvas #F9FAFB vs cards #FFFFFF vs table header #F6F6F6) — easy to render flat; rely on precise hairlines + soft shadows, verify against exports.
Three-tier muted-lavender text ramp on dark (#CFC1D8 > #A989C8 > #897398) plus low-opacity dividers over gradients are easy to collapse into generic gray, muddying the dark theme.

Chart fidelity is the biggest technical risk: smooth stacked-area/stream with per-band fade-to-transparent gradients, gradient-filled bars, and axis quirks (duplicate 500 y-labels, 'rvents' typo in source) — decide up front whether to replicate export quirks or correct them.

Signature glows (purple radial hero/report, yellow media halo, purple→white banner fade) must be CSS gradients/box-shadows, not images, and must never reduce text contrast — needs careful layering behind content.
Partner logos and white/footer logo variant are only available pre-composited; responsive reflow or recoloring may require re-exporting individual monochrome SVGs.
Report + employee tables at mobile: choosing horizontal-scroll vs stacked-card transform per table, while guaranteeing the page body never scrolls horizontally.
Color-token duplication (#7C30F7≈#7C2FF7, #1E1E1E≈#222222, #FE2E2E≈#FF0000, etc.) risks drift — must collapse to single tokens in the Tailwind config before building.

Interactive state coverage (FilterPill single-select, StatusBadge dropdown, table sort + select-all indeterminate, FAQ accordion, nav mega-dropdowns) is broad — scope state machines early to avoid rework.
recommendedPlan: Phase 0 — Foundation (design tokens + primitives): Encode the deduped color system, Plus Jakarta type scale, spacing, radii, and shadow tokens into tailwind.config.ts + CSS variables (with dark-theme overrides). Self-host Plus Jakarta Sans + a monospace. Build primitives: Button, Input, CaptureBar, Badge/Pill, EyebrowLabel, Divider, Card, Avatar, IconButton, Logo. Phase 1 — Layout shells: DarkHeroFrame/RoundedPageContainer (with glow), MarketingLayout, DashboardLayout + Sidebar + TopBar + Tabs. Phase 2 — Hero warm-ups (validate dark theme + primitives): build hero-breached then hero-passwords (adds TerminalCard + mono + sparkline). Phase 3 — First dashboard (validate light shell): dashboard-pro-plan (Card, GradientBanner, ChecklistItem, readonly form). Phase 4 — Data layer: build the ChartCard wrapper + chart components (HBar, VBar, LineChart, StackedArea, StackedBar, LegendRow) against the documented chartRamps, plus StatCard and DataTable primitives — read the dataviz skill first. Phase 5 — Data-heavy screens: report-exposure, then dashboard-employee-exposure, then dashboard-threat-overview (each reuses the Phase 4 layer). Phase 6 — Marketing long-scroll: home-landing last, assembling reused hero/stat/footer components plus its one-off sections (ComparisonCard, FlowBar, FeatureCard, SplitPanel, FaqAccordion). Phase 7 — Polish: interactions/states (accordion, dropdowns, sort, filters, hover/focus), responsive reflow rules, asset swap-in (real screenshots, white logo, individual partner logos, brand icons), and accessibility/contrast verification against exports.
